headline: OpenAI alums have been quietly investing from a new, potentially $100M fund
desc: Zero Shot, a new venture capital fund with deep ties to OpenAI, is aiming to raise $100 million for its first fund. It has already written some checks.

headline: OpenAI’s vision for the AI economy: public wealth funds, robot taxes, and a four-day workweek
desc: OpenAI proposes taxes on AI profits, public wealth funds, and expanded safety nets to address job loss and inequality, blending redistribution with capitalism as policymakers debate AI’s economic impact.

headline: The AI gold rush is pulling private wealth into riskier, earlier bets
desc: On a recent episode of Equity, we  talked to Arena Private Wealth to explore a growing trend: family offices bypassing VCs to gain direct exposure to AI startups, turning them from passive investors into active participants.

headline: AI startup Rocket offers vibe McKinsey-style reports at a fraction of the cost
desc: Rocket's new AI platform combines strategy, product building, and competitive intelligence, aiming to move beyond code generation.

headline: Google quietly launched an AI dictation app that works offline
desc: Google's new offline-first dictation app uses Gemma AI models to take on the apps like Wispr Flow.
